title: Qutb ad-Din Haydar Mausoleum
summary:
The Mausoleum of Qutb ad-Din Haydar (Persian: مقبره قطب الدین حیدر) is a Timurid-Safavid Mausoleum and mosque belonging to the 13th century Sufi saint Qutb ad-Din Haydar. It is located in Torbat-e Heydarieh, Iran, which was named in his honor.
It was listed among the national heritage sites of Iran with the number 175 on 6 January 1932.


== References ==

It was listed among the national heritage sites of Iran with the number 175 on 6 January 1932.
